title: Medsi - Healthcare Platform Russia/CIS
problem: Russian patients need better access to healthcare information and appointment booking. Fragmented system across vast geography.
solution: Healthcare platform for Russia and CIS: clinic search, appointment booking, telemedicine, health records. One of largest in Russia.
target_customer: Russian and CIS patients, clinics, doctors
traction_signals: One of Russia's largest healthcare platforms
varden_fit: LOW - Russian market, regulatory and geopolitical complexity. But shows infrastructure need in large market.
notes: boring_software=false, contrarian=false. CEE/Russia representation. Large market but complex environment.
